name: logmagnifier
description: A powerful log analysis tool for Visual Studio Code, featuring advanced log filtering and diverse highlighting options.
author: webispy@gmail.com

logmagnifier.tempFilePrefix.description: Prefix for the filtered temp files.

logmagnifier.statusBarTimeout.description: Duration for status bar messages in milliseconds.

logmagnifier.jsonPreview.enabled.description: Enable automatic JSON preview update when active line changes.

logmagnifier.jsonPreview.maxLines.description: Maximum number of lines to process for JSON preview. Selections exceeding this limit will be truncated.

logmagnifier.regex.enableHighlight.description: Enable highlighting for Regex filters in the editor.

logmagnifier.regex.highlightColor.description: Background color for Regex highlight. Can be a color string, a preset name (e.g. 'Red'), or an object with light/dark values.

logmagnifier.bookmark.maxMatches.description: Maximum number of matches to add to bookmarks at once.

logmagnifier.removeMatches.maxLines.description: Threshold for confirming removal of lines matching selection.

logmagnifier.adbLogcatDefaultOptions.description: Default options for adb logcat command.

logmagnifier.adbEnablePublicIpLookup.description: When enabled, System Info queries the device's public IP via https://api.ipify.org. Disabled by default for privacy.

logmagnifier.timestamp.enabled.description: Enable timestamp detection and analysis features.

logmagnifier.timestamp.autoDetect.description: Automatically detect timestamp format when a file is opened.

logmagnifier.timestamp.customPatterns.description: Custom timestamp patterns for format detection.

regex.description: Regular expression to match the timestamp.

captureGroup.description: Capture group index that holds the timestamp string.

logmagnifier.timestamp.gapThreshold.description: Minimum gap duration in milliseconds to highlight as a silence.

languageModelTools.name: logmagnifier-getLogSummary
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get summary information about the active log file: total lines, file size, detected timestamp format, time range, and current filter match counts.

languageModelTools.name: logmagnifier-searchLog
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Search the active log file for lines matching a keyword or regex pattern. Returns matching lines with line numbers. Use this to explore log content before creating filters.

pattern.description: The search keyword or regex pattern

isRegex.description: If true, treat pattern as a regular expression. Default: false

caseSensitive.description: If true, match case-sensitively. Default: false

maxResults.description: Maximum number of matching lines to return. Default: 50

contextLines.description: Number of context lines before and after each match. Default: 0

languageModelTools.name: logmagnifier-getFilters
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List all filter groups and their filter items in LogMagnifier. Returns group names, filter keywords, types (include/exclude), enabled state, and match counts.

enabledOnly.description: If true, return only enabled filters. Default: false

languageModelTools.name: logmagnifier-addFilter
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Add a word or regex filter to LogMagnifier. If the specified group does not exist, it will be created. The filter is immediately applied to the active editor for highlighting.

keyword.description: The keyword or regex pattern to filter

groupName.description: Name of the filter group. Created if it doesn't exist. Default: 'AI Filters'

type.description: Filter type. 'include' keeps matching lines, 'exclude' removes them. Default: 'include'

isRegex.description: If true, treat keyword as a regular expression. Default: false

caseSensitive.description: If true, match case-sensitively. Default: false

languageModelTools.name: logmagnifier-removeFilter
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Remove a filter item by keyword or remove an entire filter group by name from LogMagnifier.

keyword.description: The filter keyword to remove. If not specified, removes the entire group.

groupName.description: Name of the filter group. Required.

languageModelTools.name: logmagnifier-applyFilter
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Apply all enabled filters to the active log file and create a new filtered document. Returns the number of matched lines and total lines processed.

filterType.description: Which filter type to apply. 'all' applies both word and regex filters. Default: 'all'

groupName.description: If specified, apply only filters from this group. Otherwise apply all enabled groups.

languageModelTools.name: logmagnifier-filterByTimeRange
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Filter the active log file by time range and open the result in a new tab. Use startTime only to trim logs before that time (keep from startTime onward). Use endTime only to trim logs after that time (keep up to endTime). Use both to extract a specific time window. Supports HH:MM, HH:MM:SS, HH:MM:SS.mmm formats.

startTime.description: Start time (e.g. '14:30', '2024-01-15 14:30:00', '+5m' for relative). If omitted, no lower bound.

endTime.description: End time (e.g. '15:00', '2024-01-15 15:00:00', '+10m' for relative). If omitted, no upper bound.

languageModelTools.name: logmagnifier-listProfiles
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List all saved filter profiles with their word/regex filter group counts. Profiles are named filter configurations that can be used in workflows. Also shows the currently active profile.

languageModelTools.name: logmagnifier-switchProfile
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Switch to a different filter profile. All filters in the editor will change to the selected profile's configuration. The active editor's highlights update immediately.

name.description: Name of the profile to activate

languageModelTools.name: logmagnifier-createProfile
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Save the current filter configuration as a new named profile. The profile can later be used in workflows or switched to via switchProfile. Current filters remain active.

languageModelTools.name: logmagnifier-listWorkflows
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List all saved log analysis workflows. Each workflow contains ordered steps that reference filter profiles. Returns workflow names, step sequences with profile names, and execution modes (sequential/cumulative).

languageModelTools.name: logmagnifier-runWorkflow
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Execute a saved workflow against the active log file. Each step applies its profile's filters sequentially or cumulatively. Returns per-step results: matched line counts and output file paths.

name.description: Name of the workflow to run

languageModelTools.name: logmagnifier-getBookmarks
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get all bookmarks for the active log file. Returns line numbers, line content preview, and keyword tags for each bookmark.

languageModelTools.name: logmagnifier-addBookmark
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Bookmark specific lines in the active log file. Optionally add a keyword tag for categorization (e.g., 'root-cause', 'crash-point'). Multiple lines can be bookmarked at once.

languageModelTools.name: logmagnifier-extractJson
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Extract and parse JSON objects embedded in a log line. Returns the parsed JSON structure. Useful for analyzing API request/response payloads in logs.

line.description: Line number to extract JSON from (1-based)

startLine.description: Start line for multi-line JSON extraction (1-based). Use with endLine.

endLine.description: End line for multi-line JSON extraction (1-based). Use with startLine.

languageModelTools.name: logmagnifier-toggleFilter
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Toggle a filter item's enabled/disabled state. Use getFilters first to see current filter states.

groupName.description: Name of the filter group containing the filter.

keyword.description: The keyword of the filter to toggle.

languageModelTools.name: logmagnifier-toggleFilterGroup
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Toggle a filter group's enabled/disabled state. When disabled, all filters in the group are excluded from matching.

groupName.description: Name of the filter group to toggle.

languageModelTools.name: logmagnifier-setContextLine
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Set the number of context lines shown before and after each filter match. Valid values: 0 (none), 3 (±3), 5 (±5), 9 (±9).

groupName.description: Name of the filter group containing the filter.

keyword.description: The keyword of the filter to configure.

languageModelTools.name: logmagnifier-setCaseSensitivity
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Set whether a filter matches case-sensitively or case-insensitively.

groupName.description: Name of the filter group containing the filter.

keyword.description: The keyword of the filter to configure.

enable.description: true for case-sensitive, false for case-insensitive.

languageModelTools.name: logmagnifier-setHighlightMode
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Set the highlight mode for a filter. 'word' highlights only the matched text, 'line' highlights the line content, 'fullLine' highlights the entire line width.

groupName.description: Name of the filter group containing the filter.

keyword.description: The keyword of the filter to configure.

languageModelTools.name: logmagnifier-navigateToTime
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Move the editor cursor to the log line closest to a specified time. Supports absolute (HH:MM, HH:MM:SS, HH:MM:SS.mmm) and relative (+5m, -30s, +1h, +100ms) time formats.

time.description: Target time. Absolute: '14:32', '14:32:15', '14:32:15.500'. Relative from cursor: '+5m', '-30s', '+1h', '+100ms'.

languageModelTools.name: logmagnifier-extractLogsWithMargin
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Extract log lines around a center time with a ± margin in seconds. For example, to get logs within 10 seconds before and after 14:30, use time='14:30' and marginSeconds=10. Opens the result in a new tab.

time.description: Center time. Absolute: '14:32', '14:32:15'. Relative from cursor: '+5m', '-30s'.

marginSeconds.description: Margin in seconds applied before and after the center time.

languageModelTools.name: logmagnifier-removeBookmark
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Remove a bookmark at a specific line number in the active file. Use getBookmarks first to see current bookmarks.

line.description: Line number of the bookmark to remove (1-based).

languageModelTools.name: logmagnifier-removeAllBookmarks
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Remove all bookmarks across all files. This is a destructive operation that cannot be undone.

languageModelTools.name: logmagnifier-updateFilter
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Update a filter's keyword or nickname. Use this to refine filter patterns during analysis without removing and re-adding.

groupName.description: Name of the filter group containing the filter.

keyword.description: Current keyword of the filter to update.

newKeyword.description: New keyword to replace the current one.

nickname.description: New display nickname for the filter.

languageModelTools.name: logmagnifier-updateFilterColor
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Change the highlight color of a filter. Colors: color00 (none/bold), color01 (yellow), color02 (orange), color03 (red), color04 (magenta), color05 (violet), color06 (blue), color07 (cyan), color08 (green), color09-16 (lighter variants).

groupName.description: Name of the filter group containing the filter.

keyword.description: The keyword of the filter to change color for.

color.description: Color ID: color00 (none), color01 (yellow), color02 (orange), color03 (red), color04 (magenta), color05 (violet), color06 (blue), color07 (cyan), color08 (green), color09-color16 (lighter variants).

chatToolSets.name: logmagnifier
chatToolSets.description: Log analysis tools: filter, search, bookmark, profile, workflow, JSON extraction, and time range

commands.title: Add Word Filter Group
commands.description: Create a new group to organize word filters

view/item/context.when: viewItem =~ /filterGroup.*/ && (view == logmagnifier-filters || view == logmagnifier-regex-filters) && viewItem == filterGroupDisabled
viewItem =~ /filterGroup.*/ && (view == logmagnifier-filters || view == logmagnifier-regex-filters) && viewItem == filterGroupEnabled

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
